hooks.command: git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && printf '{"systemMessage":"You have uncommitted changes — consider committing before closing."}' || true

git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null; C=$(git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline 2>/dev/null); L=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null; git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$C" ]; then jq -n --arg c "$C" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("This repo has updates available on origin/main:\n"+$c+"\nTell the user updates are available and ask whether to pull them with git pull before doing other work; wait for their answer.")}}'; elif [ -n "$L" ]; then jq -n '{systemMessage:"there are local changes — commit & push to save your changes to server"}'; else jq -n '{systemMessage:"github: you are up to date 👍🏼"}'; fi
